core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Mission Control aesthetics with Sci-Fi HUD precision.
Emotion First: The user is a Pilot/Engineer. The UI must feel robust, precise, and trusted.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Chrome is minimal.
Negative Space: Use it to separate dense data clusters.
Contrast: High contrast for sunlight readability (if field use) and dark mode focus.
anti_patterns: Purple/Teal primary buttons (reserved for AI/Special actions only).
Center alignment for data (Left align always).
Gradient overload (Flat or subtle texture preferred).
Soft shadows (Use sharp borders and glow).

components.instructions: Use NativeWind classes. Create reusable components in /components/ui/. Avoid raw View/Text styling in screens.

library.name: Button
library.styles: h-12 px-6 rounded-lg flex-row items-center justify-center font-medium active:opacity-80

variants.tactical: bg-background-tertiary border border-brand-accent/30 text-brand-accent uppercase tracking-wider

library.name: Card
library.styles: bg-background-card border border-border-default rounded-xl p-4 md:p-6 shadow-sm

library.name: Input
library.styles: h-12 bg-background-tertiary border border-border-default rounded-lg px-4 text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-muted focus:border-brand-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-primary

library.name: Badge
library.styles: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

dashboard.structure: Responsive Grid. Mobile: Stack. Desktop: 3-Column (Left: Files/Signals, Center: Main Analysis, Right: Diagnostics/AI)

flight_log_list.style: List of 'Tactical Cards'. Each card shows: Flight Date, Duration, Max Alt, Battery Used, Health Score (Badge).

analysis_view.style: Split View. Top/Left: Signal Tree (Accordion). Center: Multi-Chart Canvas (Synced Scrubber). Bottom: Timeline.

diagnostics_panel.style: Right Sidebar (Collapsible). Auto-scroll to warnings. Red/Yellow alerts prominent.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on overlays (e.g., Modal, Floating Action Button, Toast).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows in dark mode for definition.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid large gradients. Use subtle linear gradients on chart areas (fade to transparent) only.
visual_enhancers.motion: Layout animations for expanding/collapsing panels (LayoutAnimation or Reanimated).

images.description: Small white object flying - Use for Welcome/Splash Screen or Empty State.
White and black drone - Use for generic flight log thumbnails.
Drone in blue sky - Use for 'New Flight' or 'Upload' areas.
Airplane in sunset - Use for history or profile headers.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is APCA compliant (Lc 75+ for body text).
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44 points for all interactive elements.
accessibility.labels: All inputs and buttons must have aria-label or accessibilityLabel.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'nativewind', 'tailwindcss', and 'react-native-reanimated' if not present.
2. STRUCTURE: Create /components/ui/ folder. Build atomic components (Button, Card, Input) first.
3. NAVIGATION: Use Expo Router (app directory). Implement Tabs for mobile, Sidebar for Web (Responsive Layout).
4. CHARTS: Use 'react-native-gifted-charts' for mobile performance. Optimize for large datasets (downsample if >1000 points).
5. MOCK DATA: Create a robust mock flight log (JSON) with fields: altitude, speed, battery, vibration, gps.
6. AI: Mock the OpenAI response for now. Display it in a 'Copilot' chat interface.
7. UNIVERSAL: Ensure all Views use 'flex' and 'bg-background-primary' to fill screens.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container. Left align text for readability.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
For Web compatibility in Expo: use 'Platform.select' for platform-specific chart/map implementations if needed.
